Form 15G, 15H gone: Will new Form 121 simplify TDS for taxpayers?Form 121 is a self-declaration that allows individuals to request that no TDS be deducted on certain types of income. This usually includes interest earned from bank deposits, post office schemes, or similar sources.

The film is a straight-forward documentation of the effects of war on the lives of commoners.

Live: Iran Revolutionary Guards say they launched attack on Amazon cloud site in BahrainUS-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: The Iran-US-Israel conflict is intensifying, with tensions spreading across the region and new flashpoints emerging. The US military says it has now hit over 12,300 Iranian targets, including command and control centres, ballistic missile sites and storage bunkers, while more than 155 vessels have been damaged or destroyed. It also says over 13,000 combat flights involving advanced fighter jets and bombers have been carried out since the war began. On the ground, the situation remains volatile. An airport in Iran's Isfahan province has reportedly come under attack, while Kuwait says its air defences engaged three cruise missiles and 15 drones in the past 24 hours. Even as US President Donald Trump claims Iran has sought a ceasefire, Tehran has denied making any such proposal. Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps said the Strait of Hormuz will not be opened to the enemies of this nation by the ridiculous displays of the US President. Trump is set to deliver his first primetime address on the war today, as attacks continue across the region. Meanwhile, Houthi rebels in Yemen fired ballistic missiles at southern Israel, describing the strike as part of a coordinated effort with Iran and Hezbollah. Stay with IndiaToday.in for the latest and live updates.

Live: Bengal hostage row handed to NIA, Supreme Court issues notices to officialsAssembly Election News 2026 Live Updates: Campaigning has picked up pace across key states, with flashpoints emerging in West Bengal, Tamil Nadu and Kerala. In West Bengal, the Malda incident has escalated into a major political row, with 18 arrests so far and the probe handed over to the NIA. Clashes were also reported in Cooch Behar during nomination filing, while Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has accused the Election Commission of failing to protect judicial officers. In Tamil Nadu, candidate selection has gathered momentum with the Congress CEC meeting in Delhi, as DMK chief M K Stalin stepped up attacks on the Centre and pitched welfare promises. TVK chief Vijay has filed his nomination from Tiruchirappalli. In Kerala, Prime Minister Narendra Modi has intensified outreach, claiming a growing BJP-NDA support base ahead of polling.
